programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: As Ben Waddell's new girlfriend arrives to the Summer House, she and Ciara Miller bond over manicures: "This is for every bitch who said I don't make friends easily.".

programme.desc: After Joe and Maddi's disagreement, they discover that their issues won't be so easily resolved.

programme.desc: Follow a tight-knit circle of Rhode Islanders who have families that go back generations; these decade-long friendships prove that in a state this small, there's no escaping your past ... or each other.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live With Andy Cohen
programme.desc: Host Andy Cohen welcomes guests from some of television's most popular series, as well as other entertainment stars, to chat about pop culture and celebrities in the news.

programme.desc: Host Andy Cohen welcomes guests from some of television's most popular series, as well as other entertainment stars, to chat about pop culture and celebrities in the news.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Cameoke: "The Voice" winner Alexia Jayy; Oscar Isaac and Carey Mulligan; Steve Schirripa; scenery bags; teen zookeepers.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Truth: Did I Find My Mom 2 Weeks Ago?
programme.desc: Lisa has spent 40 years searching for her biological daughter, Crystal, of whom she lost custody because of her youth and drug use; Crystal says their recent reconnection has been one-sided and dismissive of her feelings.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Tensions boil over as the group is forced to navigate interpersonal drama in the workplace; Emmy is under fire after actions she took against Brad and TJ. Michols takes a stand in defense of his bestie.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Brad attempts to bury the hatchet with Maddi and makes a revelation about Emmy; the group heads to Folly Beach for a healing trip where Mia confronts Maddi upon arrival.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Emmy is in the hot seat at the group dinner; Joe tries to prove his worth at work; Grace Lilly makes waves at Girls and Gays night.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: After Grace crosses a line, Maddi is pushed to the brink; Lake struggles to balance her friendships after receiving some unexpected news from Michols; Brad questions Emmy's sincerity after Justin spills some tea; Grace reveals a secrets.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Amidst brewing tensions, Maddi and TJ plan a group trip to the Edisto River; Nichols gives Lake the silent treatment; Emmy attempts a reset with Brad.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: The group continues their river vacation; Nichols remains hung up on Lake; Emmy tries to clear the air with Brad; once everyone's back in Charleston, tensions arise between Maddi and Joe.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: After Joe and Maddi's disagreement, they discover that their issues won't be so easily resolved.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: As summer approaches, tensions are on the rise in the Valley; Jax and Brittany continue picking up the pieces from their separation; Jesse and Michelle juggle co-parenting their daughter, Isabella, while starting new relationships.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Jax's life comes under tough scrutiny as he is confronted about his recent behavior; he finally admits he's at rock bottom and elects to seek professional help; Zack tries to find stability in his friendship with Brittany.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.sub-title: The Billionaire and the Boys' Chat
programme.desc: Michelle and Jesse's divorce takes an ugly turn when a rumor about Michelle begins to spread; Brittany tries to put the pieces of her life back together after Jax checks into a mental health facility; Luke reveals a major life milestone to Danny.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Jesse and Kristen arrange a getaway to Santa Barbara hoping everyone can find peace and heal; Zack and Janet sit down for a heart-to-heart conversation; Jax, still struggling with his emotions, makes his presence felt in Santa Barbara.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: The group's Santa Barbara retreat continues to unravel; emotions escalate between Jesse and Michelle leading to an explosive argument; Nia is blindsided when Zack tells her that some of the group has been talking behind her back.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: The Santa Barbara trip comes to a dramatic end as Nia fights back against Brittany, Jasmine and Janet; back in L.A., Jesse seeks guidance as he hopes to rebound from his wine country fight with Michelle.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Brittany takes the first step toward regaining her self-confidence with a mommy makeover consultation; Jasmine's growing friendship with Lala is tested on a girls' night out, leaving Michelle in the middle.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Danny and Nia continue to struggle with their newborn daughter refusing a bottle; as Kristen grapples with postpartum blues, her relationship with Luke is tested when their first date night out without Kaia turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: The emo themes are on point as the Republic crew debates wigs, aesthetics and what emo even means; between jokes and glam, lingering drama with the girls leaves emotions running high.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Danny and Nia continue to struggle with their newborn daughter refusing a bottle; as Kristen grapples with postpartum blues, her relationship with Luke is tested when their first date night out without Kaia turns into a disaster.

programme.sub-title: If I Steal, I Take It All; DNA: Interactions Have Consequences
programme.desc: Tammy suspects that her cousin Rhonda stole money from her on the way back from a funeral; Monica doesn't want her child to grow up with the pain of not knowing who her father is.

programme.desc: The ladies try to tap into the healing energy of Sedona, but Kyle and Dorit's friendship remains on the rocks; Bozoma and Rachel struggle with the desert heat while the others embrace the elements on a hike to the vortex.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Rachel hosts a psychic soirée for the group and revelations come when Sutton presses Jennifer Tilly about her comments made to Kyle in Sedona; Boz travels to Nevada in hopes of continuing her fertility journey; Dorit confronts Amanda about her remarks on her marriage, but emotions run high when Amanda discloses it's the anniversary of an unimaginable loss; Rachel's friend Natalie Swanston Fuller joins the group.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: The tension continues at Dorit and Erika's birthday dinner as Kyle is pulled into the middle of Amanda and Dorit's drama. Rachel's tough exterior finally cracks. programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.sub-title: The Cult's Out of the Bag
programme.desc: Rachel finally gets her wish with a Hot Girl Summer at a Hamptons club. Kyle and Dorit put their problems aside to enjoy the vibe. Boz and Sutton want to get to know the real Amanda, who finally sheds light on a tough time in her past. Erika and Sutton dine with Denise, who opens up about her volatile divorce. Erika stuns the table with a revelation of her own.
